Module com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida
Package com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game

Class Game

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.Game
All Implemented Interfaces:
IGame
public class Game extends Object implements IGame
Main game logic class for the Escritura Rapida typing game. Manages the game state including the current level, word validation, time control, and win/lose conditions. Delegates time management to TimeManager and word generation to Words.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Juan JosÃ© Morera GÃ³mez

  • Field Details

    • WINNING_LEVEL

      private static final int WINNING_LEVEL
      The level at which the player wins the game. The player must complete level 45 to trigger the win condition.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • level

      private int level
      The current level of the game.

    • gameOver

      private boolean gameOver
      Whether the game has ended in a loss.

    • timeManager

      private TimeManager timeManager
      The time manager responsible for tracking and updating the countdown.

    • wordBank

      private Words wordBank
      The word bank responsible for generating and validating words.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game()
      Constructs a new Game instance. Initializes the level to 1, sets game over to false, and creates new instances of Words and TimeManager.
      Since:
      1.0

  • Method Details

    • startLevel

      public String startLevel()
      Starts the current level by initializing the timer and generating a new word for the player to type.
      Specified by:
      startLevel in interface IGame
      Returns:
      the word the player must type in this level
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • TimeManager.initTime(int)
      • Words.generateWord()

    • isGameWon

      public boolean isGameWon()
      Checks whether the player has won the game. The game is won when the current level exceeds WINNING_LEVEL.
      Specified by:
      isGameWon in interface IGame
      Returns:
      true if the player has won, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • checkAnswer

      public boolean checkAnswer(String userWord)
      Validates the player's answer against the current word. If correct, increments the level by one.
      Specified by:
      checkAnswer in interface IGame
      Parameters:
      userWord - the word typed by the player
      Returns:
      true if the answer is correct, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • Words.validateWord(String)

    • getLevel

      public int getLevel()
      Returns the current level of the game.
      Specified by:
      getLevel in interface IGame
      Returns:
      the current level
      Since:
      1.0

    • getTimeLeft

      public int getTimeLeft()
      Returns the remaining time for the current level.
      Specified by:
      getTimeLeft in interface IGame
      Returns:
      the time left in seconds
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • TimeManager.getTimeLeft()

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Returns whether the game has ended in a loss.
      Specified by:
      isGameOver in interface IGame
      Returns:
      true if the game is over, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • decrementTime

      public void decrementTime()
      Decrements the remaining time by one second. Delegates to TimeManager.decrementTime().
      Specified by:
      decrementTime in interface IGame
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • TimeManager.decrementTime()

    • isTimeUp

      public boolean isTimeUp()
      Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.
      Specified by:
      isTimeUp in interface IGame
      Returns:
      true if time is up, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • TimeManager.isTimeUp()

    • onTimeUp

      public boolean onTimeUp(String userWord)
      Performs the final word validation when the timer reaches zero. If the player's input is correct, the level is incremented. If incorrect, the game is marked as over.
      Specified by:
      onTimeUp in interface IGame
      Parameters:
      userWord - the word typed by the player at the moment time ran out
      Returns:
      true if the word was correct and the player is saved, false if the word was incorrect and the game is over
      Since:
      1.0
      See Also:
      • Words.validateWord(String)
